political.s: FEC: $264K in executive political donations; partisan lean split across 12 executive donors.

wiki.extract: Dr Pepper is a carbonated soft drink created in the 1880s by American pharmacist Charles Alderton in Waco, Texas. It was first marketed nationally in the United States in 1904. The beverage is manufactured and distributed by different companies depending on the country: Keurig Dr Pepper produces it in the United States, Canada, and Mexico; The Coca-Cola Company in the United Kingdom, Ireland, and Japan; and Suntory in most European territories. Variants include a diet version and, beginning in the 2000s, a range of additional flavors.

sampleRecords.event_description: Collision between a moving and standing vehicle, nonroadway
sampleRecords.final_narrative: An employee was moving a pallet of product in the shop when their electric pallet jack struck a stationary forklift. The employee's ankle was caught between the vehicles and fractured.

sampleRecords.employer: Keurig Dr. Pepper Inc. Dba The American Bottling Company
sampleRecords.event_description: Caught in running equipment or machinery during regular operation
sampleRecords.final_narrative: An employee was operating a de-nester machine that orientates pallets as they move on to the assembly line. The employee was manually loading a pallet onto the elevator that brings the pallet to the next level. The elevator engaged and his hand was crushed between the pallet and the elevator as it lifted. The employee was hospitalized with injuries to the right hand including broken bones.

sampleRecords.event_description: Struck by swinging part of powered vehicle
sampleRecords.final_narrative: An employee was opening a swing door on a tractor trailer. The wind pushed the door back, and it struck the employee's head and shoulder. The employee was hospitalized, having suffered a head injury requiring stitches as well as a broken right arm.

sampleRecords.employer: Motts, LLP / DBA Dr. Pepper Snapple Group
sampleRecords.event_description: Contact with hot objects or substances
sampleRecords.final_narrative: An employee was removing a filter screen while cleaning a line for a flavor change when hot water sprayed out from the pressurized filter and contacted the employee. The employee was hospitalized with first degree burns to the torso, arms, and upper legs.

sampleRecords.part_of_body: Chest, except internal location of diseases or disorders
sampleRecords.event_description: Struck by object or equipment, unspecified
sampleRecords.final_narrative: An employee was preparing wiring for an industrial baler when the wire uncoiled and lacerated his sternum.
